data.current_summary: Query reservations in nested day structure
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves reservations for a specified facility organized in a nested day structure, where reservations are grouped by date. data.current_summary: Delete reservations for a user in a date range
data.current_description: Requires reservations-write permission. Maximum 31 days range. At least one of uid, externalId, or email is required.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes reservations for a specific user within a facility and date range. Requires reservations-write permission and authentication. Returns a DeleteResponse confirming the number of reservations deleted. Side effect: permanently removes matching reservation records from the system.
